title: helianthus porteri
intro: Helianthus porteri, also known as Porter's Sunflower, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. This perennial herb is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Helianthus porteri include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Helianthus porteri can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of health issues, including respiratory problems and skin conditions.
